creator: mi@kot.ne.mediaone.net
text:
As installed by the news/aub port, it will only recognize
	EOL by the \n symbol. Too many postings use \r :( I don't
	know where they come from (MACs?), but the included patch
	seems to make aub work nicer.

Fix: Please, commit this thing into aub's patches/patch-eol or
	something...
